description_long: This is a dark wooden bed frame with a prominent, ornately contoured headboard featuring a gentle arch and decorative paneling. The frame is constructed from what appears to be solid wood, with a rich, deep brown finish that highlights the wood grain. The bed has a slatted base made of lighter-colored wooden slats, providing support for a mattress. The footboard and side rails are lower and simpler in design, with subtle carved details that complement the headboard. There is no mattress or bedding present, leaving the slatted support structure fully visible. The overall style is traditional, with elegant curves and a robust, sturdy appearance.
description: A dark wood bed frame with an ornate arched headboard and visible wooden slats, featuring traditional carved details and no mattress.
description_view_0: The back view highlights the tall, arched headboard with its decorative wood grain and curved silhouette.
description_view_1: The side view shows the depth of the bed, the thickness of the frame, and the slatted base extending from headboard to foot.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full headboard design, the slatted support system, and the carved details on the lower frame.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the bed's length and the structure of the slatted base.
